description: [ELON] Define Drizzle schema for shopify_credentials (id, shop_domain, access_token, scopes, installed_at, updated_at) and shopify_orders (id, shop_domain, order_number, total_price_cents, currency, line_items_json, customer_id, customer_email, created_at, synced_at, webhook_event_id). Add indexes on order_number (unique constraint with shop_domain), created_at (for date range queries), and webhook_event_id (for idempotency checks).
successCriteria: Schema file compiles with zero TypeScript errors
Tables include all specified fields with correct types
Foreign key relationships documented in comments
